calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioner Ding Huan Huang; mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Xue Hong Xie.
Minor: Wei Qi Cao present in court.
Declaration re: further notice to other parent on file.
Proof of Publication on file.
The court in open court waives any further notice to other parent based on declaration on file and examination by the court of the mother/petitioner.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Wei Qi Cao to Katelynn Weiqui Cao.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
